claim_boundary: Only the four dart_best/Native-collision traces may corroborate the rendered cells. The paper_cpu/Native traces are separately indexed diagnostics and do not establish render equivalence or paper parity.

visual_capture_projection_comparisons.limitation: The core comparison covers contacts, exact solves, fallbacks, and status for the visual-compatible dart_best/Native-collision lane. Warm-start-count drift is retained explicitly. This is not full-state equivalence.
